title: GATE Agent Bill of Materials (ABOM)
description: Authoritative manifest for an agent version: model, prompt bundle, tool schema set, invariant bundle, policy bundle. v1.3 adds current_baseline_hash so the C19 baseline is tied to the ABOM version.

abom_hash.description: Stable hash over the canonicalised ABOM contents. Recorded in policy decisions, replay traces, and C19 baselines.

config.description: Temperature, top_p, max_tokens, seed, etc. Pinned for replay.

current_baseline_hash.description: Hash of the active C19 behavioural baseline for this ABOM. Required at bounded and high-privilege tiers per Check18. Updates trigger the C19 re-baselining workflow.

memory_quality_bundle_hash.description: Hash of the active C18 quality bundle in force for this agent. Recorded in every quality_decision event.
